name: contacts-unify
description: Consolidate/dedupe contacts from macOS, iCloud, Google, Zoho, or VCF with provenance-aware review, backups, and optional approved dossiers.

interface.shortDescription: Consolidate/dedupe contacts from macOS, iCloud, Google, Zoho, or VCF with provenance-aware review, backups, and optional approved dossiers.
interface.longDescription: Consolidate/dedupe contacts from macOS, iCloud, Google, Zoho, or VCF with provenance-aware review, backups, and optional approved dossiers. Works best on a local machine with user-specific files and tools available.
defaultPrompt: Consolidate and dedupe my contacts across all sources into one address book, giving me a simple review UI that shows competing values with provenance and edit dates so I choose the winners. Back up first, dry-run before any change.
